text: Kayla and staff helped me make an informed decision to remove my dark and blocky microbladed brows. I understood that there might be some red tint left behind that couldn’t be targeted due to the melanin in my skin, but I decided to proceed anyway and they look so much softer. I will book again for a follow up visit. The procedure was uncomfortable but quick and efficient! Thank you!!!
author: Jade James-Gist

text: Loved it
author: Dominic Chambrone

text: The staff was friendly, professional, and highly knowledgeable, making me feel welcome from the moment I walked in. They ensured I was comfortable throughout my visit, maintained a clean environment, and clearly explained each step of the process. My first session exceeded my expectations, and I can’t wait to go back.
author: Jesse

text: Emily was rad and made sure I was good to go for both my sessions. Nice folks at this location. I saw exceptional results with my treatments, and would recommend to anyone looking into treatments.

text: All the the reps and techs at the 3rd Street location are super nice and greet you by name as soon as you walk through the door, with that type of kindness , I almost don't want to leave And that would be loitering  Amazing place ,just amazing

text: What a pleasant visit. Greeted and fully informed on everything that I wanted and needed to know. 👍🏼👍🏼
author: Jose

text:
Amazing atmosphere and very friendly and professional staff.
I especially want to highlight how wonderful Emily is—she has been taking care of my tattoo removal, and she is incredibly friendly, caring, and attentive. She does a great job of keeping you distracted and comfortable during the treatment, which makes the whole experience much easier. The rest of the team is amazing as well—professional, welcoming, and truly supportive.
author: Vanja Milovanovic

text: Emily is literally phenomenal
author: Molly Liebman

text: So nice and so knowledgeable! Thank you Emily!
author: Tuesday Hansen

text:
I’ve gone to another Removery before and they were a little better with customer service.

At this removery I walked in and didn’t get help for around 10 minutes. When I said “hello” someone finally came out and said “I’m with someone” ok girl all you had to do was acknowledge me.

The laser tech was cool, funny and nice. Good at what she does.

The only thing I didn’t like was that I had supposedly REALLY good results.

The laser tech asked if I wanted to let removery use my photos as marketing. No payment, no discount for future lasers. They just asked me to sign away my before and after images. Which is wild. I spent close to 2,000$. You want to use my body and results to bring in more customers?

Kind of wild that they just slid me the doc to sign and didn’t even offer me a discount or explanation.

I think removery should rethink some things. If you use someone’s literally body for marketing the that person should benefit. Especially in Los Angeles lol
author: katie fay

text: Emily at Removery Beverly Grove was amazing. She was kind, professional, and made the whole experience feel comfortable and easy. She took the time to answer my questions, explain the process clearly, and made me feel really taken care of. The staff was welcoming, the space was clean, and everything felt very professional. I really appreciated the great customer service and I’m looking forward to coming back. Highly recommend Removery Beverly Grove, especially Emily!”
author: Osvaldo Perez

text: Emily is the best!! I’ve started seeing so much progress in my tattoo since I started coming here, and also way less pain while getting it done (her ice technique is 10/10). It’s quite a drive for me to get to this location but well worth it!
author: Alyssa Lichtenberger

text: The girls who work here are very sweet and they make a very unpleasant experience a bit more tolerable. I wish I didn’t have to put myself through  this pain but Removery is quick and professional.

text: The best Removery location! Everyone is so sweet, knowledgeable and helpful about every step of the journey.

text: Session 8 of 12 down, and I can say that I've had nothing but a positive experience here! The ladies are awesome, and always remember me. I've never had a late appointment and they can always get me in within a reasonable amount of time. Def recommend to anyone looking for tattoo removal!

text: Kayla was amazing. Go here and not laser away.

text: I’ve been going to the Beverly Hills location for almost a year now and it’s been a great experience working with Emily she is so knowledgeable, fast and friendly! No regrets with this place. Emily is always so fast and friendly, she actually cares! :)

text: I’ve been going to Removery for over a year and my technician Emily has been amazing. Some of my tattoos are already almost gone, which shows how effective the treatments have been. I highly recommend Emily and the team at Removery!

text:
Awesome place, I’m glad I chose here to start the removal process. Emily was so great, patient and knowledgeable along with the initial specialist who consulted with me and let me know my options. They are very friendly and there was no pressure at the end to get the service done which I loved. They even checked back on me the following day.
Can’t wait to continue this journey with removery!

text: Amazing as always, Careen was so thorough, gentle and carefully examined all of the spots where the ink still needed to be touched up. Thanks Removery!

text: absolute best! They do everything to make it comfortable!! I’m so excited to notice a difference!!
author: justine petrucci

text:
If you’re reading this, your search is over. I spent weeks calling and personally vetting tattoo removal places all over LA, and most of the experiences were discouraging—rude staff, long holds, questionable cleanliness, and blatant price gouging.

Yes, tattoo removal is expensive, but the quotes I received for ten small, already faded letters were $800–$2,000 more than what I paid here at Removery.

This isn’t a “you get what you pay for” situation. It’s more like “we rip people off because it’s LA and we can.”

Removery was the complete opposite. The facility is spotless, and the staff made me feel welcome immediately.

Ask for Nurse Emily if you can. She was incredibly professional, patient, and friendly. I was in and out in about 15 minutes—and even got a lollipop for not whining too much 😂.

10/10 experience. Highly recommend.
author: Jourdan Potee

text: I’ve worked with Emily at the third Street location the last couple times. What a pleasure. So thankful I found removery. My tattoo is gone.
author: Matt Robertson

text:
Everyone here was super super kind. Emily was my technician, and not only was she super friendly and sweet, but she also made my removal process way less painful because she really makes sure to ice the area very well and doesn’t rush the process. She’s skilled at what she does and also a joy to be around :)

The other people I briefly interacted with at the front desk were also very personable and kind. Overall, one of my favorite Removery locations!
author: Faith Bakar

text: I’m currently removing a blackout tattoo and the progress have been great so far! Careen have been helping me remove my tattoo and she’s very friendly and does an amazing job!! Highly recommend this location for anyone who’s looking to remove tattoos!

text: I’m already starting to see it fade, which is super encouraging. It takes patience, but you really just have to trust the process!

text: Amazing staff ! They love what they do and they try their best on achieving the results we aim for ! I totally recommend this place .

text: Eyebrow tattoo removal is definitely not for the weak. However, Cindy made the process well worth it. While I’ll likely need another session there’s a huge difference in my brows and I’m very pleased with results.

text: I had a great experience at Removery! Cindy was really nice, fast, and checked on me the entire time to make sure I was comfortable. The process was smooth, and the staff was friendly and professional. I really appreciate the care and attention highly recommend!

text: I really appreciate the professionalism of the staff lizet and Cindy are the best thank you so much guys

text: I love the experience here. All the consultants make sure you’re comfortable and confident. Great energy from both the front desk as well as the nurses. I can’t wait to get this removal done. I just completed my first session and it wasn’t as bad as it seems! I would definitely recommend coming here not just for the great customer service but also because their knowledge based on this procedure is outstanding. I feel more confident coming to Removery because they specialize in tattoo removal rather than a Med Spa who could do tattoo removal, injectables, laser hair removal, etc. Lizet and Cindy happily accommodated to my busy schedule and fit me in when needed. Don’t even hesitate like I did coming here. I wish I knew about them sooner.

text: Lizet and Cindy greeted me warmly and then were even kinder as I emotionally felt apart. They were professional and helpful while still showing such humanity. I bought a package and had my first treatment before leaving. I highly recommend Removery, especially the Woodland Hills location!

text: Cindy is an absolute dream. She is so  attentive  and caring. I’m so grateful for her and removery!.

I felt so comfortable that I actually started my first session right after the consultation, thankfully they had time for me. Highly recommend them if you're looking for a professional and supportive team!

text: I love this place I always get me in and out quick and they take good care of me even when I’m scared of the laser😂😂😅

text: I highly recommend this place 10/10 . The nurse is also very professional  and very humble. I really love this place I’m so glad I’m getting my tattoo removal at this location. So happy . THANK YOU SO MUCH.

text:

They always make me feel comfortable, explain what to expect, and check in to make sure I’m healing well after each session.
I’m so happy with my experience and the progress I’ve seen so far. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!

text: Cindy and Lizet were amazing, I went in for a quote and I got out with my first session I’m so excited and thankful I found them they made me feel like family  I highly recommend them for  anyone looking for tattoo removal to go to Cindy and Lizet they make a difficult process go so smooth thank you girls

text: I’m a tattoo artist, I recommend them to my clients and I go there myself. I do very delicate fineline work and a lot of my clients come to me hoping that I can fix a tattoo that turned out  darker or bolder than what they wanted. The only way for me to give them what they want is to go through the laser removal first. Their equipment is top of line and operated by knowledgeable professionals, I go to the woodland hills store and I have to say the staff is incredible. They will give you all information you need and u will go home with all ur aftercare. I’d give 6 stars if I could

text:
I had an amazing experience with Lizet and Cindy during my tattoo removal process. From the very beginning, they were extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough in explaining every step of the procedure. They made sure I understood how the process works, what to expect during each session, aftercare instructions, and realistic timelines for results.

They answered all of my questions patiently and made me feel completely comfortable and confident in moving forward. The environment was clean, welcoming, and well-organized, which made the experience even better.

Tattoo removal can feel intimidating, but Lizet and Cindy truly made it smooth and reassuring. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal — you’ll be in professional, caring hands.

text: Crew was really nice and welcoming and polite very friendly and friendly

text: I had such a wonderful experience at Removery in Woodland Hills and I cannot recommend it enough if you’re considering tattoo removal. text: Great experience with Removery! I’ve been wanting to get a couple tattoos removed for several years and am happy to start that process here. Lizet was friendly and honest explaining everything in detail, from how the procedure works to payment plans and financing, estimated amount of sessions, and showed me before and after photos as well as sharing her own experience. Cindy was kind, reassuring, and calming. The session was quick and hurt less than getting the tattoos.

text: Came in for a consultation Lizet helped me out fast and efficiently she was so nice and welcoming will definitely be back

text:
Life-Changing results for Old Tattoos ( Eyebrows & Back)
After years of covering up, I decided to remove my tattoos , I chose Removery, and I’m glad I did! From the consultation they were honest and clear about the process for two different areas. The technology they use is top-notch. Cindy was incredibly careful and gentle.The back sessions were more intense due to size and ink age. But she made as comfortable as possible. The results have exceeded all my expectations.My back & my eyebrows have faded almost completely. I couldn’t be happier.100% recommend!

text: They’re always very professional and they always make sure that the process runs very smoothly.

text:
version:

This is my second time coming to this center to remove my tattoo.

I highly recommend this place.
If you want to remove your tattoo without the risk of burning your skin, scarring, or leaving marks, this is definitely the place to go.

text: So far have done 2 sessions. Staff are very nice and professional and I’m always in and out so fast! 👍🏼✨

text:
My first consultation was so quick and easy. The employees are so kind and have great personalities! My first treatment was SO quick I didn’t even realize it was over! I’m so thankful for a quick and easy process! This whole office has a clean doctors office vibe.

6ish session updates: I am still very very please with Removery. The pain level increased a tiny bit, but it’s still so quick! I’m in and out in 12mn.
Emily is so kind and patient. She takes the time to answer all of my random questions, is honest about treatment duration and what I should expect as the laser intensifies. I appreciate that she offers breaks if needed, longer ice pack time and tips to make the process as a whole more comfortable.

text: I’m giving 2 stars because the crew is friendly when you’re there. But if you don’t work a 9-5 and need any kind of flexibility in your schedule please beware that you’ll have to skip treatments, they have no room to change appointments to weekends, they’ve taken on more patients then they can service at these tiny studios. Even if you try to go to surrounding studios they don’t have time either. Just know before you pay them thousands of dollars and sign away years of your life that if you have to move or change an appt it will be WEEKS before you can get in. I wish someone had told me before I signed away thousands of dollars to be told “sorry, we can’t help.”

text: Very friendly and professional staff. The whole team makes you feel welcome and comfortable from the moment you arrive. The procedure is quick, and even though it can be painful, they create such a calm and supportive atmosphere that it feels much easier to get through. I really appreciate their care and attitude. Highly recommend!

text: They used to be on top and very accommodating. Unfortunately, they started to not be accommodating and pushing treatment appointments outside the usual routine. The usual routine used to be every 4 weeks, and they started to push up to 12 weeks apart. They stopped checking in on recent treatment and stopped appointments confirmation and reminder text, so I missed my last appointment. When I asked them why, they replied shortly and unapologetically that I opted out of texts, which is a lie. When I replied that I never did that, they stopped replying and didn’t ask to set a new appointment. Upon calling them, their phone was disconnected, so I had to call the general support number. Worst experience so far.

Excellent experience.

text: I’ve had such a great experience with Removery! I have been receiving treatments for almost 2.5 years from multiple different Removery locations but the Pasadena one is my favorite with the best technician Willy. Every appointment is always on time, I never have to wait and Willy makes the process so quick and easy. My tattoos are almost completely gone and I have zero scarring or issues and I couldn’t be happier with the results. I will miss coming here once I’m done!
author: Lily Sheedy

text: Tattoo removal is something I’ve been considering for a long time. Sadly half the reason I hadn’t gone was the embarrassment of the tattoo I wanted removed. The staff at Removery here in Pasadena made me feel so comfortable from the moment I walked in. Office is very clean, staff is super friendly, informative,and professional. I was quickly seen and even approved for financing. Everything was easy. A nurse was even readily available to proceed with my first treatment same day. I look forward to seeing my body rid of this awful tattoo. I’ve read good reviews about other locations as well, but I think I will be having all my treatments done right here in my hometown, Pasadena. Thanks for the easing my anxiety about this journey guys!
author: Belle

text: They do an amazing job! 10/10 would recommend
author: Grace Shi

text: service is always friendly, quick and simple
author: Tracie Chazares

text: Andrina was so helpful and informative during the consultation. She was also very comforting and reassuring that this process is going to be worth every penny in the long run. And she has had removal done so she knows EXACTLY what it's like and what to expect. That made me feel better that she wasn't just trying to tell me what she needs to for a consultation. She told me her experience and that automatically made me decide I was doing this FORSURE. Disney was my removal specialist, he talked me through the session. It was really hard and no it did not feel great but he was fast and careful. Him talking me through the pain and telling me how far along it was and if I needed breaks or anything was great and helped me lock in. It was also nice to have a stress ball to squeeze during lol. Another nice lady, forgot her name she is also a removal specialist, she was very nice and helped me get a great video and pictures of the session. All people working here are so friendly and kind and I'm excited to keep going back for my sessions. And for all who wanna know about the price, I can't tell you what the exact number can be because it varies on size, color etc etc etc. Just know that yes, it is more expensive than a tattoo BUT you have payment options/plans and they are super easy to sign up for. My total is 3000 for a big name on my chest, and 4 quarter sized hand tattoos. My monthly payments are low and work for me (166 a month) my total does not reflect what yours might be, yours could be way less or way more, get a consultation! It's worth it! Also, if you do the payment plan, you got unlimited sessions. Definitely better than going in and paying every session, that costs way more!!! I got my plan, I'm happy and I'm making my monthly payments to get rid of this ridiculous crap I have on my body so I can be happy and confident again. Thank you everyone at this studio, you guys are all amazing.
author: Spooky Grim

text: Very experienced and organized.The manager was great at explaining all the details of what is offered. Thank you!
author: Darren Tachine

text: It was a great experience. Staff was nice and created a good experience!
author: Lee Mutter

text:
I had an excellent experience with this tattoo removal business from start to finish. The staff was professional, knowledgeable, and made me feel comfortable right away. They took the time to explain the entire process, what to expect during each session, and answered all my questions without rushing me.
The facility itself was clean and well-maintained, which gave me a lot of confidence in their work. The treatment was quicker than I expected, and while there was some discomfort, the technician made sure I was as comfortable as possible throughout.
After a few sessions, I’ve already noticed a significant difference in the fading of my tattoo. What really stood out to me was their honesty—they set realistic expectations and didn’t overpromise results.
If you’re considering tattoo removal, I highly recommend this place. They combine professionalism with genuine care, and it really shows in both the experience and the results.
author: George Flores

text: Great experience, Disney and andrina helped me out and were great !

text: I wish I had come in sooner!! Andrina and Disney were so kind, welcoming, and informative. text:
I had a great experience with my tattoo laser removal here at Removing!
From the very beginning, the staff has been extremely kind, and professional. They really make you feel comfortable and do their best to make the session as smooth and relaxing as possible.

Even after just my second session, I can already see a huge difference. One of my tattoos has almost completely faded, which honestly exceeded my expectations.

I truly appreciate how caring and supportive the team is throughout the process. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal.
author: Stephanie Scaranto

text: The staff at Removery are not only friendly, they are extremely knowledgeable and passionate about their field.  Their priority is to understand your goal, then suggest an appropriate package.  After 4 sessions my tattoo appears to look like a faint bruise.   I'm confident after 1-2 more seesions, it will no longer be visible.  Well worth the investment if considering a full or partial removal.
author: Stephanie Baptiste

text: Disney’s the man. Most professional, very grateful for him!!
author: Karen Marin

text: Great experience today!!!! Andrina and Disney were amazing. I had an SMP artist who went in too far in my temples making me look like the ultimate warrior lol…Disney cleaned it up and looks way better. Simple process and overall great experience! Highly recommended if you need any type of removal work. Price was reasonable as well.
author: Brian Pfau

text: If you need a tattoo removed, these folks are the best! true professionals!
author: Vicente Alvarez

text: Quick and friendly service
author: Nini

text:
I had my old eyebrow permanent makeup removed at the Kearny Mesa location, and it was honestly the best experience I've had with any cosmetic procedure. The administrative team member, Andria, was incredibly informative and understanding from the first call—she answered all my questions patiently and made me feel completely at ease about the process.
The nurse, Foujan, was absolutely amazing—skilled, gentle, and professional throughout. I was surprised and thrilled that just one session completely removed all the old tattoo pigment with only very mild discomfort (barely noticeable!). The absolute best part? There was zero damage to my existing natural brow hair—my brows look fuller and more natural than ever.
The facility is clean, modern, and the whole team is so welcoming. If you're considering eyebrow tattoo removal (especially non-laser options like dermablading), I can't recommend this place highly enough. Thank you, Andria and Foujan—you made this so easy and gave me the results I dreamed of!
author: Andrea Greenberg

text: I really like this place! It is  clean, the girls that helped me out ( Andrina-Foujan) were really helpful, they explained everything good, and listened to questions both really helpful and professional :) the process was quick it does hurt but is manageable even tho I thought it was impossible to remove that tattoo they reassured me that it was possible,  im on my second session and I can see good results,  so thank you!
author: Karina Lizarraga

text: Andrina was very helpful in answering all of my questions and Allison was great as well and made me feel very comfortable during the whole process.

text:
Walked in and felt welcomed immediately 🙏🏼
A very comfortable and smooth experience.
I highly recommend!

I did a lot of research and had multiple consultations with different clinics before choosing Removery as my final tattoo removal spot.

text:
From day one it’s always been the same energy calm, welcoming, never awkward, never rushed. They genuinely listen, answer every concern about post-op care and make you feel heard the whole process. You can tell they truly put their clients first.
I’ve been with them for three years now, and that alone should say something.

text: Everyone was very professional and the customer service was excellent 👌 thank you Tattoo Removery

text: I just had my first tattoo removal session and I was honestly really nervous because I had never done it before. Andrina and Foujan were amazing. They were so patient and took the time to calm me down and explain everything to me. They made me feel comfortable the whole time and didn’t rush me at all. The session went way better than I expected because of how supportive they were. If you’re scared or thinking about tattoo removal, I definitely recommend coming here. They really care and make the experience so much easier.

text: So grateful for this place! The staff is amazing, professional, knowledgeable and accommodating. The establishment itself is squeaky clean and has a relaxed feel to it. The results honestly exceeded my expectations and my brows were fully removed after the session, and I’m so happy with how everything turned out. You can tell they really care about their clients and the quality of their work.
I highly recommend them to anyone considering laser tattoo removal. Such a great experience all around!

text: It doesnt hurt as bad as you guys would think, this is the best to do it painless and professional, very welcoming and family type of vibe when you walk in and amaIng service

text: Consistently I have an appointment and when I show up they are running 20-30 minutes behind schedule. The first time I thought it was a fluke but this is the third time in a row and now I am quite frustrated with this location especially considering you pay up front, so now I am stuck going to a place that is CONSTANTLY running behind schedule. Highly disappointed with this company and location. They need to start adding buffer room are turn away clients if they show up late. Something must change with HHQ policy.

My sessions were quick and I’m already seeing great results with my tattoo fading. I highly recommend Removery to anyone looking for safe and professional tattoo removal

text: amazing service everyone is really nice and they make u feel really taken care of. thank you all u have made this a really good experience 🤍
author: Cristal casillas

text:
I decided to start laser tattoo removal because I had a tattoo that no longer represents who I am today. It was meaningful at one point in my life, but as I’ve grown and changed, it just didn’t reflect me anymore. I wanted a fresh start, and choosing Removery was honestly one of the best decisions I made.

From the very beginning, the experience has been smooth and reassuring. Cali at the front office was incredibly helpful and welcoming. She provided detailed information during my free initial consultation and made sure all my questions were answered. I never felt rushed or pressured, which made me feel confident moving forward.

Julius has been amazing throughout this entire process. He is very thorough, professional, and always takes the time to explain what to expect before and after each session. The treatments themselves are almost painless, much easier than I anticipated. He makes sure I’m comfortable the whole time.

I’ve had almost seven sessions so far, and the results are definitely noticeable. My tattoo has significantly faded, and I’ve had no issues with healing at all. The aftercare instructions are clear, and everything has healed smoothly each time.

Overall, I highly recommend Removery. The staff is knowledgeable, supportive, and truly cares about your experience. If you’re thinking about removing a tattoo that no longer fits your story, this is the place to go.
author: Aubrey Brion

text: The staff at Removery Chula Vista are always so kind and have made this experience a breeze! Thx

text: They’ve been great, everyone is very professional and they do the most to make you comfortable

text: Thank you for being so good to me during such a painful process! I had to get my microbladed brows done three times. It’s such a delicate place to get work done. Chris did all my treatments. text:
My tattoos were a bad decision. Coming to Clean Slate Ink was a great one.

text: Friendly service and I'm seeing great results! I'm thankful to have a removal clinic so close to home with many convenient appointment times to choose from.

text: I scheduled a picolaser treatment with Dana for some spots on my cheek and wasn’t seeing the results I wanted about a month later. Now a few weeks out and the spots on my cheeks have dramatically improved! Thank you, Dana!!

text: DO NOT GO HERE. Save yourself the heartache. I got a terrible filler job done and they refused to refund me to get it done elsewhere. They took no accountability and they gave no apology. It is strictly about taking your money regardless of what they do to your face.
author: Kelly Longenecker

text: I’m literally so freaking happy! I had my first session with the Pico laser to remove my micro bladed eyebrows and they are basically gone! After the session with Dana, I looked in the mirror and just wanted to cry. Even with my brows swollen to the high heavens with redness and bleached hairs…I was stunned. I cannot recommend Clarity Skin enough. If you’re thinking about doing this service, just do it! I’ve only had one and I’m completely satisfied already. So thankful for Dana. She is amazing, so sweet and personable. Thank you! I’m so happy! Added a picture, top is no make up, two micro bladed sessions with one touch up each, last session was over 4 years ago. They are pretty faded, gray and saturated. Middle is 3 hours after my session and bottom was my micro bladed brows with make up. I’m so excited for a more natural look! :) thank you Dana and Clarity Skin!

text: I had such a great experience at Clarity Skin Medical Spa. Jocelyn is fantastic at laser hair removal — she’s thorough, professional, and makes you feel completely comfortable through the whole process. text:
I had the best experience with Brooke for my lip filler and flip! From start to finish, the process was smoot and so professional. On top of that, the staff at Clarity is so kind and helpful, and the entire office is clean and comfortable to be in.

text: They are incredible! I got my micro blading laser removed and the pigment is completely gone after just one session. I recommend coming here if you need laser removal!

author: Joanna

text:
CAUTION READ 1ST BEFORE CONSIDERING ERASEABLE INC !!! ⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️

Read this first if you’re considering tattoo removal.

It takes a special level of precision, experience, and attention to detail to properly target tattoo ink, especially colored ink, the way Kristen and her team do. The care they put into their work is truly impressive.

The results I’ve seen are remarkable. The before and after photos speak for themselves. Proof that what they’re doing really works. Seeing those results kept me motivated throughout my own tattoo removal journey, especially knowing they are removing something that was meant to be permanent.

Erasable Inc. truly feels like a one of a kind business. I can understand why they are not franchised or spread across multiple locations, because the level of meticulous work they do would be very hard to duplicate.

I highly recommend Erasable Inc. to anyone thinking about tattoo removal. Thank you Kristen and the team. I’m looking forward to my next session!
author: Hadiya Isaacs (Hadiya)

text: Lacey was absolutely wonderful! She was knowledgeable, spent the time to educate me, and the services were painless. Coming back for more!

text: Love Erasable Med Spa. Everyone is so sweet, knowledgeable and helpful. They thrive to do what's right for you. Love and highly recommend them.

Probably the most relaxing and enjoyable facial I've had, even with the "gritty" DiamondGlow dermabrasion part. I realized that it just wasn’t a good fit for what I was hoping for . I’m  thankful she was so transparent about expectations. She also was able to have the surgeon speak to me about another option I had not seriously considered snd that was awesome .  I did end up going ahead and having my microbladed brows lasered ( tattoo removal) because I want to treat them differently. I will absolutely return to this business for the many services they offer . It was a great professional environment.

I've been to two removery locations now (the last one being on the east coast) and they're always great. The folks at this location are particularly phenomenal though. Great chat, cosy environment, and the least painful lasering I've had done to date (which is a significant amount). I really recommend them.

Update March 2026: I've faced some health struggles and the folks here have been unbelievably gracious about rescheduling, long breaks, and adjusting our treatment plan. As someone who doesn't feel comfortable with people easily I can say that I always feel comfortable here. You're really in great hands at this location.
author: James

text: Trish has been nothing but the best.
author: Michael Kelly

text: Happy I found Removery.  They helped with my tattoo removal and they were very nice to me. Thank you
author: Max Power

text: Excellent!
author: Myrna Ceballos

text: Every staff member makes this process as painless as possible. They’re all very kind, and knowledgeable about the treatment. I highly recommend Removery, this location in particular!
author: Kasper

text: When I first stepped into Enfuse I knew it was the place for me. I was greeted warmly and the space felt so comfortable and inviting. I fell in love with it. Taylor was amazing, she knew of my previous skin cancer and how nervous I was about treatments to my face. Taylor really took the time to analyze my skin and prepare a plan for me that would improve my skin and give me confidence and a beautiful glow. Enfuse really understands how all these treatments work together to give you the best possible results. Taylor started with the vascular laser which reduced my redness and eliminated broken capillaries. She also used IPL for my sun spots and sun damage. The real stars at Enfuse are the Frax and Morpheous8. Taylor did an incredible job explaining exactly what these processes do – resurfacing skin and improving tone, tightening texture and wrinkles. Specifically how even after the treatments are over they are still working for you for weeks to come, helping collagen production and new skin replacing old so you keep looking and feeling fresher and better. I cannot think of a more wonderful environment than Enfuse and to have someone as knowledgeable and specialized as Taylor helping me to navigate this journey. She is such a star, I can’t thank her enough and the team at Enfuse!!!
author: Sharon Trager

text:
I had such a great experience here that I felt like I had to share.

From the moment I walked in, Kevin at the front desk made me feel so welcomed and comfortable. He was kind, patient, and just had such a positive, calming energy—which honestly sets the tone for the whole visit.

Patti did my eyebrow tattoo laser removal, and I can’t say enough good things about her. I can finally say goodbye to my dark angry bird eyebrows!  She took her time to really listen to what I wanted to achieve with my face treatments and walked me through everything in a way that felt honest and thoughtful—not rushed or scripted. What stood out the most to me was that she didn’t try to push any products or upsell me. Instead, she genuinely explained what she would do if she were in my position trying to achieve the results I’m looking for. That kind of honesty is rare and so appreciated. As someone working hard to feel confident again and like what she sees in the mirror again, this felt like a breath of fresh air.

You can tell she truly cares about her clients and takes pride in her work. Her energy is warm, reassuring, and very genuine, which made me feel completely at ease throughout the entire process.

I also want to say—nowadays we rely so much on social media, and it’s easy to feel discouraged if you don’t see tons of before-and-after photos or videos of specific treatments. But this experience reminded me that it’s absolutely worth coming in for a consultation, because Patti is truly worth it. Her knowledge, honesty, and approach can’t always be captured online.

My commute was over an hour. Could I have found somewhere closer? Maybe. But finding someone with her kind of energy and positive aura made it more than worth the drive. I left feeling more confident and genuinely happy with my results—and to me, that’s worth the drive and then some.

I’m so happy I found this place, and I will 1,000% be coming back for my full face laser and Sculptra.

If you’re even thinking about booking, just do it. You’ll be in the best hands.
author: D

text: Enfuse Medical Spa is the only place I trust with my face! As a member of the LGBTQIA+ community, it can be difficult to find providers who are well-versed in affirming care, but each provider I have worked with has been incredibly knowledgeable and skilled. Enfuse has treated me with the utmost kindness, respect, and quality care for six years. Anyone and everyone would benefit from a visit here!
author: Zia Varajon

text: Thank you Matiysn for providing exceptional care! You do a great job at making someone feel comfortable and at ease. You have my trust and I look forward to seeing you every time!
author: Melany E

text: I had an incredible experience getting microneedling with Matisyn! I’ve been thinking about getting this treatment for a while and spoke to a lot of different providers, but I’m beyond happy that I waited until I found Enfuse. Matisyn really eased my nerves and explained everything in detail so I actually knew what was happening on my face. It’s such a comfortable space with the best staff - I highly, highly recommend!!
author: Peter Morrison

text:
I am blown away by my results!  I met with Patti for a consultation initially - which deserves it’s own moment.  It wasn’t a consult piggy-backed with a service but purely an offering to meet and discuss where I’m coming from and what outcomes I desire.  She genuinely listened and helped me design an approach with absolutely zero pressure.

My primary concern being my dark spots, Patti guided me toward the Light and Bright Treatment… my only regret is not doing this sooner!  I thought she was only planning on attacking the bigger spots; but she went after all noticeable hyperpigmentation!  It honestly took years off of my face!  Even the texture appears smoother, in addition to some bonus plumping Patti pointed out around the jowl area (from the collagen stimulation.)

The before/afters are stunning to me.
1 session.  3 weeks apart.
I could not be more thrilled!

I am so impressed and appreciative to Patti’s meticulousness, precision, and artist’s eye.  I can confidently say she is as passionate about your results, as you are.  Alongside all of this, she is just a joy to be around.  I stuck around at least 30 minutes after chatting with her and Kevin at the front desk.  Enfuse provides such a warm, welcoming environment and are incredibly supportive with follow-up communication/care/appmts.  I am so happy to know exactly where I'll be going for any skin/facial needs.  10/10 HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
author: Katie Petersen

text: Hola, quiero felicitar a Irene Medina ya que es una excelente profesional, muy amable, muy bella persona, me estoy haciendo una depilación láser y con tan solo 4 sesiones estoy sin 1 bello, muy contenta con los resultados y aún no he terminado, súper recomendado el lugar para sus tratamientos de belleza, la locación es muy linda, su asepsia es incomparable y todos te atienden muy bien desde la recepción en adelante
author: Len-Cal

text: I always have a great experience @Enfuse Spa with Irene she does an amazing job with facials! The amount of compliments I receive on my skin is a testament to her skill. I will continue coming back!
author: Diana Guajardo González (La Maestra)

text:
Great care and service
They’re the best
author: margaret raese

text: I went for a consultation and Dr. answered all my questions and gave me good information to help me make my cosmetic procedure plan.
author: Rosanna Santana

text: I saw Dr. Kovak this morning and as always he takes time to answer questions and listens. He is so caring, knowledgeable and gentle and his staff reflects all of these qualities.  He is very personable and helps you to relax.  I give Dr. Kovak and his office staff all A+ ratings and I can sincerely recommend this practice to anyone!
author: Sandra Donovan

text: Everyone here is super friendly and accommodating. I’ve been going for a couple of years now and they know exactly what I need done 😊.
author: Kim Hensley

text:
BEYOND ridiculous!!! DO NOT GO HERE!!!I was going to another location and loved it (Willowbrook) then I received a called 2 weeks before my appointment that the laser machine was “moved” to this location.  I was so happy with Willowbrook I decided to give this place a try.. a week ago I asked if they would honor the same price given its the same service and same machine!

Over a week later I get a call,  the price is now DOUBLE and with an aesthetician when I paid half the price with a Dr.!  This was beyond an inconvenience and just plan greedy!  I will definitely NOT suggest going to this location for anything!
author: Moore Angela

text: Love Dr. Huang! He is very attentive, takes his time, and super kind. Really appreciate him.
author: Lundyn Cuellar

text: Dr. Nguyen has performed two surgical procedures for me, one of which was particularly difficult, and his skill and expertise were outstanding. He handled everything with confidence and precision. Dr. Nguyen and his assistant, Nelly, both have excellent bedside manner and made me feel comfortable and well cared for throughout the process. I trust Dr. Nguyen completely and will continue to see him for any future dermatologic surgery needs.
author: Michael Mason

text: Horrible staff. They don’t return calls. I have called several times to make an appt with one of the doctors for surgery and was told that their medical assistant, Giovanni would call me back to set up an appointment: It’s been 2 week2  and no called back. I called again last Friday and I was told again that the medical assistant., Giovanni would call back and again she did NOT call back. I do NOT recommend this provider, stay away!
author: Gina R

text:
I had a very disappointing experience at this dermatologist’s office. I arrived about 10 minutes late to my appointment, but no one informed me that this would significantly impact my wait time. I ended up sitting in the waiting room for an hour and 20 minutes, during which I watched multiple patients who arrived after me get called in before me.

The staff only apologized after I went up to the front desk to ask what was going on. At that point, I was so frustrated that I decided to leave without even seeing the doctor.

Overall, the lack of communication and the excessive wait time made this visit incredibly frustrating. I won’t be returning.
author: Deepika Gupta

text: A small basal cell carcinoma was found just below my eyebrow after a biopsy was analyzed. Dr. Conner Chan referred me to  Dermsurgery Associates in Bellaire, TX. This was my first experience with cancer and the term MOHS surgery. I was nervous. When I called the office, they were kind, patient and informative . Prior to the appointment, we visited the offices which are very easy to find and very nice.  My doctor was Dr.Nhan Nguyen. He and his assistant were personable and thorough. I had no pain at all. I highly recommend Dr. Nguyen and this location.
author: Jesus & Donna Balderas

text: I called at 8 AM to see if I could reschedule an appointment for my highschooler. They got me in at nine that same day! Dr. Boulos was on time, and as it was just a check in, we were out the door by 910! No chemistry lab was missed!
author: Stephanie Freeman

text:
I called to schedule a consultation with Dr. Kromberg and specifically asked if there was a consult fee. I was told there wasn’t one. My appointment was scheduled for 10:45 am, and I arrived at 10:30. However, I wasn’t seen until 11:30, and the appointment itself lasted no more than 10 minutes.

Afterward, I was informed there was a $150 consult fee. I explained that I was told over the phone there was no charge, but the staff said they weren’t sure who I spoke with and that I still needed to pay.

I’m sharing this so others are aware - be sure to confirm any fees in writing beforehand. I feel misled and disappointed to have been charged $150 for something I was told would be free. Transparency and clear communication about costs are very important, and unfortunately, that was lacking here.
author: Sania Khan

text: Will be going back!
author: Melissa Woolery

text:
OMG! What a Blessing! Tlc from Donna and Irene. Kudos. See ya next month for treatment # 2. Microwaving ink removal...quick and merely felt a mild sting... over in 30 sec to 60 sec per brow. What a relief!
Mary, The Woodlands
author: Mary Scaggs

text: OMG best laser place I ever been . Only two sessions in and I feel so loved and welcomed. Always smiles & giggles . And she lasers me from the rooty to the rooty !! I love a girls girl !! Thanks for being a great establishment!!
author: Tayla Smith

text: I have moved states 3 times since starting laser treatment on my tattoos and I still make the trip to see Irene and Donna because they do such a great job. They make every single one of my treatments fun and fast. My tattoos have faded so nicely since I started seeing them and they even have other services that can address problems with scarring and hypopigmentation. I recommend them to everyone. FIVE STARS
author: Mia Stewart

text:
For my 39th birthday, I gave myself a life upgrade and finally started removing an old tattoo I’ve wanted gone for years. From the moment I walked in, the space was clean, professional, and calming. The owner took the time to explain everything in detail, and I loved supporting a family-owned business. Shop local folks and support your small businesses!

They were incredibly flexible with my schedule, which I appreciated since I’m not in Houston often. I was able to start treatment the same day, had multiple pain management options, and the technician was so sweet and gentle and checked on me throughout the process.

This is my first tattoo removal experience, and I honestly couldn’t have asked for better. 10/10 so far. Pro tip: if you find them on Groupon, book the free consult first, they’ll help you choose the best option for your goals.

Added bonus:
One of the Owners voice sounds (at least to me) like the voice from ChatGBT and was super gracious when I demonstrated the comparison 😂
author: Ivy Cullens

text:
Spent 150 for literally a 2 min session for a small tattoo behind  my ear
A SCAM and waste of my money and time. Do your research and look elsewhere folks!
author: K TYROME

text: Best place to get laser tattoos removed. Donna is the best!
author: Elizabeth
